positive: Stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial forest scene, featuring giant glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and winding cosmic roots. The style should be a combination of Art Nouveau flowing lines and modern flat graphic design, rendered with thick, crisp outlines. The composition must be central and symmetrical, showcasing a clear silhouette of an adventurer reaching towards a starry portal. Use a vibrant, limited color palette of deep indigo, electric turquoise, luminous gold, and emerald green. Excellent negative space is crucial. Perfect for high-quality t-shirt printing, vector art style, isolated on a pure white or solid color background.
negative: blur, low quality, watermark, text, logo, signature, artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, grainy, realistic photography, harsh shadows, photorealism, bad lines, bleeding ink
